query:
SELECT * FROM completed_job_batches WHERE filename = 'review-test-sends';
SELECT id, batchId, phone, name, status, sessionId, smsSentAt FROM completed_jobs WHERE batchId IN (SELECT id FROM completed_job_batches WHERE filename = 'review-test-sends');
